title: Log
description: Configure logging using the following options. Logs will always be sent to stdout and stderr.

level.title: Level
level.description: The level of log entries to show. Debug enables stack traces on errors.

format.title: Log Format
format.description: The output format of log messages.

leak_sensitive_values.title: Leak Sensitive Log Values
leak_sensitive_values.description: If set will leak sensitive values (e.g. emails) in the logs.

redaction_text.title: Sensitive log value redaction text
redaction_text.description: Text to use, when redacting sensitive log value.
